staticCommands.description: Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to the requested version of .Net

values.name: path
values.description: Path to the directory to upgrade. Defaults to current location.

options.description: Specifies whether the project being upgraded a package/library or not - determines which docker base image to use
Specify which minor version of .Net Core you want 2 or 1. Major version is always 2 at the moment.
The Base image to use in your DockerFile. Valid options are 'Alpine' or 'Linux'
